topics.question: What is the Revenue Journey Assessment?
topics.answer: The Revenue Journey Assessment Tool (RJAT) analyzes your business across 5 stages: Awareness, Acquisition, Activation, Revenue, and Retention. It identifies the specific revenue leaks holding you back and provides a prioritized action plan.

topics.question: How do I run an assessment?
topics.answer: Open the Calculator app from the desktop. The first time you press '=', it will guide you through 5 quick questions. Answer each using the number buttons 1-5 (1 = needs work, 5 = strong). Press '=' after the final question to see your results.

topics.question: Is the assessment free?
topics.answer: Yes! The Snapshot tier is completely free and includes your Revenue Journey Assessment, Top 5 Revenue Leaks report, and Stage Score Breakdown. Upgrade to Membership or Agency for full dashboard access and AI-powered tools.

topics.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
topics.answer: Open Product Activation from the Start Menu or All Programs. Select your desired tier and follow the checkout process. Your dashboard will unlock immediately after payment.

topics.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
topics.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime. Go to Control Panel > User Accounts to manage your subscription. You'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

topics.question: What payment methods do you accept?
topics.answer: We accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay through our secure Stripe integration.

topics.question: What is the AI Strategy Chat?
topics.answer: Available on the Agency tier and above, the AI Strategy Chat (accessible via AIM > Strategy Bot) provides personalized revenue optimization advice based on your assessment results and industry.

topics.question: What does the Landing Page Generator do?
topics.answer: The Landing Page Generator creates conversion-optimized landing pages based on your Revenue Journey stage. It outputs ready-to-deploy HTML that matches your brand and targets your specific revenue leaks.

topics.question: How do I book a strategy call?
topics.answer: Open the AIM Buddy List from the desktop and double-click 'Richard Norwood'. This opens a chat window with an embedded Calendly scheduler where you can book a free 30-minute strategy session.
